response.content: Confirmed — the chat-slots demo is rendering through the custom slot wrappers. The CustomAssistantMessage component should be visible as a tinted card with a 'slot' badge in the corner.

fixtures._comment: chat-slots e2e (chat-slots.spec.ts:90 'second assistant turn is also wrapped in the custom slot') — turn 2 prompt after the 'Say hello in one short sentence' first turn. Without this fixture aimock has no match for turn 2 and the second assistant slot never mounts. turnIndex:1 is REQUIRED to avoid stealing headless-simple's turn-0 fun-fact prompt (which resolves to a different deterministic reply in headless-simple.json).

response.content: Sure — sea otters hold hands while they sleep so they don't drift apart on the current.
